Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: Neither snow nor rain nor heat nor gloom of night will keep our guys from their special delivery.
Video.title: Mail Jeep

Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: Stage II of our small block Chevy build gets block modifications.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Video.summary: Pat and Mike button up their Gen III Hemi with super trick heads, then it's tech tip time with Mike and Pat.
Video.title: Hemi Top End Magic

Video.summary: In Stage 3 of our small-block build, our 383 becomes a 406.
Video.title: In-House Power Mouse Roars

Video.summary: Joel & Brian mod a 6.2L supercharged '15 Camaro ZL1: faster for less cash?
Video.title: Go Fast, Spend Less

Video.summary: Upgrading our 2015 Camaro ZL1 with new brakes, coilovers, and tires for better performance.
Video.title: ZL1 Performance Upgrades You Can Feel

Image.alt: ZL1 Performance Upgrades You Can Feel
ZL1 Performance Upgrades You Can Feel
ZL1 Performance Upgrades You Can Feel

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton embark on their next project, a 2019 Dodge Charger, and give it a full super charger upgrade.
Video.title: Fully Charged

Video.summary: The EBC Brakes and Pedal Commander Charger gets its voice as Tommy installs the exhaust and suspension.
Video.title: Singing Lessons

Video.summary: The EBC Brakes and Pedal Commander Dodge Charger gets its final touches before hitting the track.
Video.title: Brake the Pavement

Video.summary: We’re at Stovalls collision and wrecking service searching for a 4 wheel drive square body.
Video.title: How To Choose A Square Body

Image.alt: How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body

Video.summary: We picked up a 1985 Chevy K-10 with a plan to do a full rebuild.
Video.title: Hip to be Square Body

Video.summary: We lay out our plan to rebuild our 1985 Chevy K-10.

The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Video.summary: The transformation continues on this clean '85 K-10 square body.

Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Video.summary: We start reassembling our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body. We add steering, brakes, exhaust, and glass.

Video.summary: Our K-10 Square body is coming back to life with restoration parts, cooling, and electrical.

Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Video.summary: We introduce our '89 Blazer with a raucous trail ride to show capabilities of Chevy's full size 4x4.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Introduction & Teardown

Video.summary: The guys drag a classic Chevy out of a hay barn.
Video.title: Barn Find Bow Tie

Video.summary: 'The guys install a plethora of new body panels on their barn-find Chevelle.
Video.title: Sheetmetal Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew Upgrades the suspension on a classic Chevelle for corner carving and high end handling
Video.title: Chevelle - New Legs

Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Video.summary: A frame-off Chevelle Barn find restoration continues with a dazzling metallic baby blue paint job.
Video.title: 72 Chevelle: Baby Blue

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys install a brand new interior in their ’72 Chevelle project.
Video.title: Chevelle Inside Out

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy finish up the barn find Chevelle build and take it to a famous road in the Smoky Mountains.

Video.summary: Engine guru Keith Dorton helps build our Ford flathead with 3/4 race cam, high compression heads and 3 deuces.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: 3 Deuce V8

Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker

Image.alt: Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads

Video.summary: How to turbo-charge an iron block LS stroker to make 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: Iron Animal 408: Wicked Turbo Power

Video.summary: The Blazer gets stripped to bare metal and our SuperMax Silverado is treated to front suspension upgrades.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Video.summary: Restoration of our 89 Blazer continues by stripping the frame bare and repairing the damage.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Frame Repair, Axles

Video.summary: Our '89 blazer frame is back from powdercoat where it can be turned into a rolling chassis.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Rolling Chassis

Video.summary: The '89 Blazer 4x4 returns for lockers in the rear - and new gearing up front, along with steering upgrades
Video.title: Klassy K5 Axle Rebuild

Video.summary: After months of prep, the '89 Blazer hits the paint booth for a custom mix of color.
Video.title: Chevy Blazer Custom Paint

Video.summary: Klassy K5 returns from fresh paint for re-assembly, and interior goodies.
Video.title: Chevy Blazer Assembly/Interior

Video.summary: The supercharged big block Blazer hits the trails in search of a big mud hole.
Video.title: Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?
